title: Life 2.0
subTitle: A nature lover pushes her ambitious human resettlement proposal to a world that is not ready for it. However, a data-related catastrophe may change everything.

title: Mentoo
subTitle: When an actor levies a director with allegations of harassment and sexual misconduct, his career is at stake. But is there truth to her claims?

title: Mere Shohar Ki Begam
subTitle: When Javed brings home a second wife, Afsana, his first wife Rukhsar is devastated. However, an unexpected bond begins to form when the true nature of their husband comes to light.

title: My Mothers Last Birthday Gift
subTitle: A woman with terminal lung cancer helps her seven-year-old son develop the emotional strength to live his life without her.

title: Naam Badal Dena
subTitle: Lifelong friends turned spouses navigate moments of doubt reassurance and reflection that reveal the depth of their connection and what true partnership requires.

title: In Your Arms
subTitle: After 14 years, Nikhil tells Payal he wants a divorce, confessing love for a colleague. Payal agrees, but only on one condition.

title: Lock-Up
subTitle: Inspector Maya Verma arrests defiant Kanchan from the red light area. Their conversation unveils an unexpected revelation.

title: Life 2.0
subTitle: A nature lover pushes her ambitious human resettlement proposal to a world that is not ready for it. However, a data-related catastrophe may change everything.

title: Abnormal
subTitle: A mother fights for her transgender son's future and freedom, striving for acceptance and harmony from her family and society.

title: Funkaar
subTitle: Through her daughter's gentle urging, a mother rediscovers her forgotten artistic passion, escaping the monotony of her routine.

title: Jaane Do Mujhe
subTitle: During a seemingly pleasant date with Aditya, arranged by her friends, Nisha hears a concerning noise from the washroom. She discovers Aditya unconscious on the floor and immediately calls her friend Priya for help. Surprisingly, Priya dismisses Nisha's concerns, suggesting it's all imaginary. This unexpected response casts doubt on Aditya's existence and the reality of the entire situation, leaving Nisha confused about what's real and what might be a product of her imagination.

title: Harmless
subTitle: A boy in need of money to make it big in life and a girl who is looking for thrill concoct a plan and stage a kidnapping to extort money from the girl's rich father.

title: Girl in Red
subTitle: A writer who is struggling with writer's block is in search of a story. However, he lands himself in trouble when he stumbles upon a deadly secret while talking to his garbage collector.

title: Jama Punji
subTitle: A late night conversation between a mother (Sarla) & her son Anshuman, 13 days after the passing of his father where they discuss the reasons for his detachment from his father and how by the end of the night, certain events lead Anshuman to accept and make amends with his deceased father.

title: Half Cake
subTitle: A poor single mother struggles fiercely to earn the extra money needed to fulfill her child's simple wish for a cake just like the one he saw in a shop.

title: Hum Types
subTitle: Despite different social classes, Charu and Makrand find unexpected common ground, as their growing connection reveals shared struggles and emotions.

title: Pravaah The Flow
subTitle: Nature photographer Shivoham travels to five locations to capture breathtaking landscapes. During his journey, unique interactions reveal deep emotions and secrets that rejuvenate him.

title: Girgit
subTitle: The true colours of public officials are revealed when the lens is focused beyond their scope of duty and instead on the selfish motivations for their insincere actions.

title: Happily Married Part 2
subTitle: Rani and Animesh, a couple who is having an affair with Jimmy plan to meet him on Saturday. The story unfolds as their meeting with Jimmy doesn't go as planned.

title: Jale Tere Honth
subTitle: A young couple on their first date with the excitement of their first kiss does not find a private moment in the crowded city of Mumbai.

title: Loha Chor
subTitle: A modest family from Haryana relocated to Dhanbad, Bihar, and took up residence in a government quarter that had previously been inhabited by the notorious Loha Chor gang during the 1980s in Bihar. The family encountered numerous challenges and social difficulties from both the local neighbourhood inhabitants and the remnants of the Loha Chor gang. Subsequently, law enforcement authorities conducted a raid on the premises.

title: Hearts Awash In Sapphire Light
subTitle: Hearts Awash in Sapphire Light unfolds the tale of two individuals who encounter each other one evening, initially under less-than-ideal circumstances. At first, they engage in petty arguments over trivial matters. However, as time passes, the undeniable power of their connection becomes evident, serving as a poignant reminder that sometimes, the most extraordinary journeys take place within the depths of our own hearts.

title: Harela
subTitle: In the heart of Uttarakhand, an elderly woman and a young man navigate the divide between heritage and progress. As a local festival begins, they must decide the future of their traditions.

title: Humari Khushboo
subTitle: Khusboo suffers from a socially taboo medical condition leading to a presentation blunder. Subsequently, she finds the courage to regain her confidence and fight the anathema.

title: The Friend To Die For
subTitle: The abduction of a young girl by a serial killer takes an unforeseen turn as revelations emerge, challenging initial assumptions about the case.

title: Hey Listen!
subTitle: Dhruv and Vidya get in touch and decide to meet each other a few years after their breakup. However, their meeting soon takes an unfortunate turn as old conflicts and emotions gradually come to the surface, causing them to get into a heated argument.

title: Housewarming
subTitle: A short film signifying how the energies we invite into our house affect us.

title: Harshit
subTitle: Fate plays a twisted game with Harshit and Rahila, who are madly in love with each other.

title: Just Take It Easy
subTitle: CEO Sanjay, who is unhappy despite his wealth, hosts Oberoi Industries' success party. He invites his girlfriend Priyanka, a model, promising to make her the company's face.

title: Hum Types
subTitle: Despite different social classes, Charu and Makrand find unexpected common ground, as their growing connection reveals shared struggles and emotions.

title: Humari Khushboo
subTitle: Khusboo suffers from a socially taboo medical condition leading to a presentation blunder. Subsequently, she finds the courage to regain her confidence and fight the anathema.

title: Jale Tere Honth

title: Harmless
subTitle: A boy in need of money to make it big in life and a girl who is looking for thrill concoct a plan and stage a kidnapping to extort money from the girl's rich father.

title: Harshit
subTitle: Fate plays a twisted game with Harshit and Rahila, who are madly in love with each other.

title: Best Friend
subTitle: A misunderstanding about his lover and friend propels Manav into a violent rage.

title: Bridge
subTitle: Widower Mukesh lives with son Rahul, 28. Rahul finds his father's behavior odd and Mukesh resents his son's constant judgment of his choices.

title: Beyond Failing
subTitle: A young student struggles with academic pressure due to poor performance. However, she sets out on a path of self-discovery and soon finds her true passion.

title: Bully
subTitle: A girl holds her brother hostage, however, she must confront the dark side of her life and face the harsh truths that threaten to break her.

title: Calling Bell
subTitle: A demented delivery man forces himself inside the house of a young lady, threatening to kill her. However, the confrontation takes an unusual turn when the true nature of his visit is revealed.

title: Believer
subTitle: A young professional grapples with career setbacks and monetary woes, sinking into despondency. Meanwhile, his inner dialogue veers towards destructive habits, with his negative self urging escapism through substance abuse or self-harm. However, despite finding temporary solace in this gloomy mindset, he yearns for his long-neglected positive self, sensing an underlying dissatisfaction with his current state.

title: Black Coffee
subTitle: A woman faces sexual harassment at the hands of her boss. Later, she decides to teach him a lesson with the help of her colleague.

title: Bed Tea
subTitle: An unexpected tale of a rainy morning brings about a question about the existence of hidden evil behaviour in relationships.

title: Bepar
subTitle: On the surface, Indian immigrant Kritika and her Pakistani husband Faiz appear to be happily married. Underneath, however, their inter-faith union is caught in between love and cultural differences.

title: Choices
subTitle: Just one day before their wedding, Ritesh confesses something to Yami that threatens to change the course of their relationship.

title: Bhagwaan - The Faith
subTitle: A routine gym outing for three friends becomes a series of unusual interactions with diverse strangers. Their day reaches a pivotal moment when they cross paths with an enigmatic street dweller.

title: Bita Hua Pal
subTitle: The journey of a woman named Mira, who, like many others, finds herself questioning the foundation of her relationship. As she navigates the ups and downs of her own love story, she reflects on the nature of love and the challenges of maintaining a lasting connection.

title: Chashmadeed
subTitle: An ageing mother, living with her entitled son and his wife, finds her sight blurring and clearing like a malfunctioning camera lens one morning. Soon, a visit to a nearby eye clinic, strongly suggested by her young neighbour, leads to unexpected revelations.

title: Charitra Varnan
subTitle: A cab driver's kind attempt to help a weeping woman who dashed out of her house after a fight with her husband goes terribly wrong.

title: Charitra Varnan
subTitle: A cab driver's kind attempt to help a weeping woman who dashed out of her house after a fight with her husband goes terribly wrong.

title: Alvida
subTitle: A heartbroken man sits alone in a bar, haunted by the end of a relationship, and confronts the agonising necessity of saying a final goodbye.

title: Anu Aur Di
subTitle: After a heated breakup, an angry girl calls her older sister for a late-night pickup. However, they soon get into a fight and are pulled over by the police.

title: Bahaar
subTitle: A young woman gets married, with the typical expectations of a blissful domestic life. However, her dreams turn into a nightmare when her mother-in-law constantly harasses and humiliates her solely because she has been unable to conceive after five years of marriage.
